polling_sequence: Read counter_value and/or observe pwm_out through the module's direct output interface; no firmware-visible register interface is implied by the spec.

consistency_notes: DIGITAL_SPEC_JSON defines only direct top-level RTL ports and does not imply a memory-mapped or byte-register software interface.
No additional hierarchy, bus wrapper, or software-controlled register block is introduced.
The PWM controller is intended for direct RTL integration; firmware-visible register mapping is therefore omitted as incompatible with the source spec.
